statuses.note: Inventory and reagent expiry dates were checked.
Sizing run completed with the matched sample batch.
Figures are ready; the final wording still needs one more pass.

statuses.title_match: Expand GFP reporter culture 5 flasks to 10 flasks
statuses.note: The culture expanded to ten flasks but growth remains slower than baseline after thaw.
One flask was retained as the anchor culture.
Seeded ten wells with the same starting density.

statuses.title_match: Confirm animal cohort arrival and cage assignment
statuses.note: Twenty five-week-old male mice were confirmed in the facility.

statuses.title_match: If reporter culture is ready: expand to 20 flasks and seed spheroids
statuses.note: Reporter growth is slower than the baseline expansion model.
statuses.trigger_condition: Proceed only if all ten flasks reach the target density at the Tuesday afternoon check.
statuses.blocking_reason: The Tuesday afternoon density check has not happened yet.

statuses.title_match: If spheroids are compact: embed in matrix
statuses.note: Embedding depends on the day-2 morphology check.
statuses.trigger_condition: Embed only if the spheroids are compact and stable during transfer.
statuses.blocking_reason: Need the day-2 morphology note first.

statuses.title_match: If cells and mice are ready: cohort start
statuses.note: This remains a gated readiness window.
statuses.trigger_condition: Only begin if both the expanded cell stock and the animal cohort are available on the same day.
statuses.blocking_reason: Need both expansion and animal readiness to remain aligned.
